titleStmt.title: SII 26.665: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 665. (A.R. No. 623 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is fragmentary. It contains a portion of the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyappāvaiyuñ cirttaṉiccelviyuntaṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiya Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭuntuṭarvaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matiṭkoḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa
liḻattaraicar tamuṭiyum ṭiyum muṉṉavaṉ pakkaṟṟeṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntara muṭiyumintiranāramun teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvalum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velaitto
l peruṅkāval pala paḻantivuñ ceṟu kālaraicukaḷaikkaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñcāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉaḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyiliraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum na
vaṉiti mutir paṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷanāmaṇaikkoṇamum veñcilai virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭai paḻaṉamācuṇitecamum mayarvil vaṇkirttiyāti nakaravaiyiṟ cantiraṉṟol kulattintirātaṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattu
kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu taṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñceru miḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcuraceṉal kocalaināṭun taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colaittaṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟattākki takkaṇaik kīrtti takkaṇalā
mayipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākattaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭamum veṟi malartta teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañcelutti caṅkirāmavicaiyotLine after this seems to be missing.
kar porttoḻil vācalil vijāyātoraṇam meyttoḷi puṉaimaṇippatavamumkaṉmaṇik katavamum niṟai cīr vicaiyamum tuṟai nir paṉṉaiyum maṉmaüvāre Line after this seems to be missing.
kāvalam puricaimevilip paṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai viḷaippantūṟuṅ kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamun Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.665 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
